use_cases: Display featured case studies on a company portfolio or work page
Showcase client success stories with logos, tags, and project descriptions
Present AI and tech company project highlights in a professional grid layout
Create a testimonials and results section for business websites
Serve as a landing page section for displaying client work and case studies
ai_summary: A case study showcase component featuring a prominent hero case study paired with a list of additional case studies. Each item displays company logo, industry tags, project title, subtitle, and links. Built with Tailwind CSS using a responsive two-column grid on desktop with hover state transitions, making it ideal for SaaS, fintech, and tech company portfolio pages to showcase client work and success stories.
